+    def delete_oldest_application_instance (self) :
+        """
+            Finds and deletes the oldest application instance
+            """

+            return
+    
+        # Find the scope_id with the smallest last_used timestamp
+        oldest_scope_id = min(
+            self.application_instances.keys(),
+            key=lambda scope_id: self.application_instances[scope_id]["last_used"]

-                # Return to make sure we only delete one in case two have
-                # the same oldest time
-                return
-

+        self.delete_application_instance(oldest_scope_id)
